violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has employees with serve safe but does not have an active RICFSM. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The pizza prep unit was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. All food in unit was observed between 43-45 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food in unit was moved to properly functioning refrigeration. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The ice machine lid was observed missing. Per PIC, ice machine lid was taken off of machine to be repaired. The prep unit lid was observed in poor repair with a wire holding the top up. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the bar 3-bay sink. Per PIC, test strips have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine and can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was moved to dishwasher. Ice machine was turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machines until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Pasta, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Pasta was observed at 70 DF and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of chili. Utensils used to dispense TCS and non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The ice machine lid and prep unit lid were observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the bar 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves, prep unit shelves, fryolator, and grill line have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects in bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (dirty shelf, bar bottle line) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2022
Prep unit located behind grill area was not in good repair, observed top being held together with tape and wires. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Observed pizza pans being stored in a cardboard box. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

At the time of inspection, faucet located at the 3 bay sink was not able to reach all three sinks. PIC informed that faucet needs to reach all three sinks to effectively wash, rinse and sanitize New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Prep Units 2. Fans (Walk-In Cooler) 3. Oven 4. Grill 5. Ice Machine New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The condensate from the bar cooler unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
